steps.title: Write the area difference
steps.content:
The outer rectangle includes the pool and the path. Its dimensions are $21+2x$ by $11+2x$. Subtract the pool area to get the path area.
$$(21+2x)(11+2x)-21(11)=144$$

steps.title: Test the positive width
steps.content:
Only a positive width can work. Substituting $x=2$ gives the required path area.
$$(21+4)(11+4)-231=25\cdot 15-231=144$$
The answer is A.
